formula_display: Wall area = Length × Height; Rolls = ceil(area ÷ (roll_width × roll_length) × 1.1)
result_context: Wall area: {wall_area_m2} m², rolls needed: {rolls_needed}, coverage per roll: {coverage_per_roll} m²
steps: Coverage per roll: 0.38 m × 10 m = 3.8 m²
mistakes: Using stud spacing in metres instead of centimetres
Forgetting to add 10% extra for cuts around windows and doors
Not checking if the roll width matches your stud spacing
example_label: Ejemplo para insulation batt calculator: valores 5m, 2.7m, 40cm, 12m

es.seo_description: Planifica tu proyecto de aislamiento térmico con exactitud. Introduce las dimensiones de pared, separación entre montantes y formato del rollo para saber cuántas unidades comprar.

en.name: Insulation Batt Calculator

en.seo_desc: Calculate how many insulation batts or rolls you need for your walls. Enter wall dimensions and roll size to get exact roll count and total coverage area.
en.seo_description: Plan your insulation project with precision. Calculate how many batts or rolls you need based on wall area, stud spacing, and roll dimensions — with instant coverage and waste estimates.

fr.seo_desc: Calculez le nombre de rouleaux d'isolation nécessaires. Entrez les dimensions du mur et la taille du rouleau pour obtenir la quantité exacte et la surface couverte.
fr.seo_description: Préparez votre chantier d'isolation sans erreur de calcul. Déterminez le nombre de rouleaux nécessaires selon la surface murale, l'espacement des montants et les dimensions du rouleau isolant.
